mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_game_progress WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 2

SELECT gc_cat.name AS categoryName, COUNT(CASE WHEN ugp.status = 2 THEN 1 END) AS completedCount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount FROM game_category gc_cat LEFT JOIN game_content gc ON gc.category_id = gc_cat.id LEFT JOIN user_game_progress ugp ON ugp.game_content_id = gc.id AND ugp.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY gc_cat.id, gc_cat.name ORDER BY gc_cat.sort_order
